title: Renormalization Group Functions of φ^4 Theory from High-Temperature Expansions
abstract: It has been previously shown that calculation of renormalization group (RG) functions of the scalar φ^4 theory reduces to the analysis of thermodynamic properties of the Ising model. Using high-temperature expansions for the latter, RG functions of four-dimensional theory can be calculated for arbitrary coupling constant g with an accuracy 10^{-4} for the Gell-Mann - Low function β(g) and an accuracy 10^{-3} - 10^{-2} for anomalous dimensions. Expansions of RG functions up to the 13th order in g^{-1/2} are obtained.
